headline: ipl 2026 shockers: samson to csk, riyan parag captain & rcb vs kkr opener! 🏏
hook_text: the ipl 2026 season is turning the cricket world upside down! from legendary trades that nobody saw coming to young stars taking the captaincy reins and a high-voltage opening clash — here are the top 3 viral stories you cannot miss! 🔥🏆

scenes.headline: sanju samson joins csk in biggest trade ever! 💛
scenes.details: the unthinkable has happened in the ipl trade window as sanju samson moves to chennai super kings. in a direct swap, ravindra jadeja has joined rajasthan royals. fans are calling this the most significant player move in league history as csk looks for a long-term wicketkeeper-captain successor.
scenes.search_key: sanju samson csk jersey | ravindra jadeja rajasthan royals trade
scenes.hook_text: is sanju samson the perfect successor to thala dhoni?

scenes.headline: riyan parag named rajasthan royals captain! 👑
scenes.details: following the massive trade of samson, rajasthan royals have officially handed the captaincy to the young and explosive riyan parag. at just 24, he becomes one of the youngest captains in ipl history, signaling a new era of aggressive leadership for the royals in the 2026 season.
scenes.search_key: riyan parag rajasthan royals captain | ipl 2026 captains
scenes.hook_text: can riyan parag lead the royals to their second ipl title?

scenes.headline: rcb vs kkr to open ipl 2026 at eden gardens! ⚔️
scenes.details: the bcci has confirmed that the opening match of ipl 2026 will be a heavy-weight clash between royal challengers bengaluru and defending champions kolkata knight riders. the match is set for later this month at eden gardens, with tickets already selling out in record time.
scenes.search_key: rcb vs kkr ipl 2026 opener | eden gardens stadium crowd
scenes.hook_text: tune with us for more such news and subscribe to find out more!

subscribe_hook: subscribe to trendwave now for your daily fix of cricket and bollywood trends! 🌊🎥

checklist.english_only_reminder: this script is in english only.
